opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I haven't peed since yesterday morning, my bladder feels like it's going to explode, and the pain is unbearable.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I've been trying and trying for 14 hours and nothing will come out — I can't stand the pain and I don't know what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: yesterday morning — I last passed urine about 14 hours ago and then it just stopped completely
symptom_narrative.character: a constant, unbearable, bursting pain low down in my belly with a desperate urge to go that never lets up
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've ever had — I can't sit still, I keep pacing and I'm sweating with it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down in the middle of my belly, above the groin
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, never eases, no matter what I do
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — I've tried sitting, standing, a warm shower, running the tap, none of it helps
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps building the longer I can't go
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: in the last hour a little bit of urine has been dribbling out on its own, but I still can't actually go and it hasn't relieved anything
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never been completely blocked like this before, but for about 6 months my stream has been weak, it takes me a while to get started, and I'm up several times a night to go
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't do anything, I'm just pacing the room in agony

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: trouble with my waterworks for about 6 months — slow stream, trouble starting, up a lot at night
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: no formal diagnosis, just gradually over the last 6 months
past_medical_history.how_managed: haven't done anything about it, just put up with it

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a cold and sinus tablet I bought from the chemist a couple of days ago for a blocked nose

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; no one else at home to help

objective_data_offered.value: my lower belly is swollen and bulging up, it feels hard and tight and it's tender to press, almost up to my belly button
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-described sensation and appearance over chat; not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: I'm sweating and restless, pacing the room, pressing on my lower belly the whole time
just a few drops dribbling out on their own in the last hour, nothing like a normal wee
